name: Penne Pasta with Tuna
recipeInstructions:
1. Place tuna, walnuts, lemon rind, Worcestershire sauce, parsley, basil, olive oil, salt, and pepper in a food processor or blender.
2. Process until smooth.
3. Cook the penne pasta according to package directions; drain.
4. Stir in the tuna mixture, coating the pasta with the sauce.
5. Serve immediately. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
